Title: Abstract City Skyline Graphic T-Shirt
Description:
A vibrant and modern take on the urban landscape, this t-shirt features an abstract, geometric rendition of a city skyline.

This design uses bold, contrasting colors (teal, crimson, and lime) against a deep indigo background, giving it a retro, yet contemporary, feel.

  • Style: Perfect for those who appreciate graphic art and minimalist street aesthetics.
  • Material: Made from a comfortable, high-quality cotton blend (check specific product details for material blend).
  • Fit: Designed for a unisex fit, suitable for layering or wearing as a statement piece.

Whether you are attending a casual gathering, heading to a creative meetup, or just adding a pop of color to your daily routine, this shirt makes a stylish and conversation-starting outfit choice. It also makes a fantastic gift for architecture enthusiasts, graphic designers, or anyone who loves the city vibe!
